# Individual Contributor License Agreement

**USF Engine — Unified Simplicial Framework**

Thank you for your interest in contributing to the USF Engine (the "Project") managed by Sami Marie Torres (the "Copyright Holder"). This Individual Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") documents the rights granted by contributors to the Project.

## 1. Definitions

"You" means the individual submitting a Contribution to the Project.

"Contribution" means any original work of authorship, including any modifications or additions to an existing work, that you intentionally submit to the Project for inclusion.

"Submit" means any form of electronic, verbal, or written communication sent to the Project, including but not limited to GitHub pull requests, issues, code reviews, or email.

## 2. Copyright Grant

You hereby assign to the Copyright Holder the entire right, title, and interest in and to your Contribution, including all copyright and other intellectual property rights therein. The Copyright Holder will hold the copyright in the Contribution, subject to the licenses granted in Section 3.

## 3. License Back to You

In consideration for your Contribution, the Copyright Holder grants you a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to:

(a) Reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, and distribute your Contribution
(b) Use your Contribution in your own personal and commercial projects
(c) Sublicense your Contribution under terms of your choosing in your own works

## 4. Patent Grant

You grant the Copyright Holder a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free patent license to make, use, sell, import, and otherwise transfer your Contribution, where such license applies only to patent claims licensable by you that are necessarily infringed by your Contribution.

## 5. Representations and Warranties

You represent and warrant that:

(a) Your Contribution is your original work
(b) You have the right to enter into this Agreement
(c) Your Contribution does not infringe any third party's intellectual property rights
(d) You are not aware of any pending legal action related to your Contribution

## 6. No Obligation

The Copyright Holder is under no obligation to use or include your Contribution in the Project.

## 7. Agreement

By submitting a Contribution, you agree to the terms of this Agreement. If you do not agree, do not submit Contributions.
